name: Assembly-Sysmon
desc: A bare-metal system monitor written in pure x86_64 assembly. No libc, no C runtime. Reads CPU, memory, load, and network stats directly from /proc using raw Linux syscalls.

name: PassGen-98
desc: A lightweight CLI password generator with configurable length, charset inclusion/exclusion, and entropy estimation. Built for speed and minimal dependencies.

name: Wilmington University Login
desc: A redesigned login page for Wilmington University improving accessibility, visual hierarchy, and mobile responsiveness over the original.

name: First Light Advocacy Website
desc: A fully responsive website prototype for the First Light Advocacy Center. Clean layout, accessible navigation, and mobile-first design.
